title: Brika Matter
description:
Your whole Matter smart home, native on your Brika dashboard. **Brika Matter** discovers, commissions, and controls Matter devices on your local network: lights, locks, covers, thermostats, switches, sensors, fans, and robot vacuums.

- **Matter Device** — control any device with a panel that adapts to its type: brightness, hue, and color temperature for lights, lock and unlock, open/stop/close for covers, thermostat modes, vacuum start/pause/dock, and live sensor readings
- **Matter Devices** — an at-a-glance grid of every commissioned device, with online/total counts and status indicators
- **Add a Matter Device** — pair a new device straight from a dashboard using its 11-digit setup code or QR string

Automate it all with workflow blocks: **Matter Command** drives any device, while **When Device Changes** and **When Button Pressed** react to attribute changes and switch gestures (short, long, double, triple). AI-discoverable tools let an assistant list, read, and control devices, and bridges like Philips Hue are detected automatically. Runs entirely on your local network, no cloud account required.
